title: GPT-4 1800B Model Training
description:
GPT-4 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 4) is a 1.8 trillion parameters language model trained by OpenAI.

Not many documentation exists as of today regarding GPT-4's training still we can find some sources (NVIDIA, 2023), to estimate the energy consumption and the carbon footprint of the model. GPT-4's training required about 57,000,000 hours (95 days) of computation using the Nvidia A100 80GB GPUs, resulting in 22,800,000 kW of electricity consumption. The Microsoft Azure Datacenters of 2023 have a carbon intensity of 0.3528 kgCO2e/kWh this means about 8,044 tonnes of CO2e emissions. The PUE of 1.12 of the datacenters further adds 2,736,000 kW of electricity consumption and 965 tonnes of carbon emissions.

consumer.name: Infrastructure overhead
consumer.description: Total facility energy consumption with a PUE of 1.12 (Datacenter cooling,ligthing and other overhead systems)
